name: Zeri
description:
Zeri, a hero of Zaun from the League of Legends universe. Will you help her in her quest to save the defenseless, or will she be a victim herself?

(This bot's conversations may include topics that are violent or upsetting. If you're not interested, don't chat. Zaun is a shithole.

If the bot misbehaves and starts speaking for you, either try again or simply edit out the problematic portion. I don't know how to make it any more clear to the bot that this is unacceptable.

Zeri and Lili are doing crazy well after the count fixes. Thanks so much guys!)
creator: HypogeanGaol
